title: Seeing the Future № 0205 — The front door is agentic
dek: Atlas, Comet, Dia, Claude-in-Chrome. The entry point is no longer a URL — it is a cursor that reads.
body:
Six months ago the browser was a neutral window. Today it is a runtime, and the fight is over who gets to sit in the address bar when you type your next intent.

The full dispatch continues at `/posts/seeing-the-future-0205` during migration; v2 will collapse this into a full READ-type block rendering the body inline.
